summary: checkout 5xx spike right after the v93 deploy
root_cause: a null-pointer in the coupon code path shipped in checkout-v93
auth-a55 added a synchronous call to a slow LDAP endpoint

summary: payments failures from an upstream processor outage
root_cause: the upstream card processor returned 503s during their maintenance window
fix: failed over to the secondary processor

summary: search slowdown after the s12 deploy
root_cause: search-s12 disabled query caching by mistake
